form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 7th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind I'm Foxing with 59kg at $7. Last start 4th of 8 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on April 5 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Giddy Girl carrying 59kg at $19. Place chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 7th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind I'm Foxing with 59kg at $7. Last start 4th of 8 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on April 5 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Giddy Girl carrying 59kg at $19. Place chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
On jumping bumped by Fontein Forte. Carried wider passing the 200m.

form.formComment: At debut, didn't do much in the run home; second last of 10 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Two To Tango carrying 59kg at $16. Need to see again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At debut, didn't do much in the run home; second last of 10 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Two To Tango carrying 59kg at $16. Need to see again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 2nd of 8 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Alleviate carrying 59kg at $1.30. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on November 12 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Espana with 58kg at $2.70. Form reads well and he's well placed to go one better now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Second-up. form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 8 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on April 10 over 1200m, slow going 2.25 len behind White Hot Mama carrying 57kg at $7. Before that ran last in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 13 len behind Our Yonglee carrying 57kg at $7. Making headway. Hard to beat on that latest effort.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 6th of 12 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1000m, 6 len behind Bel Lupa carrying 56kg at $31. Second-up 4th of 8 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, on heavy track; 1.75 len behind Tillya Tepe with 57.5kg at $10. Can improve again and figure in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 200m, eased off the heels of Tillya Tepe.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1600m, soft track; 5 len behind Knee Deep with 52kg at $6. First up last campaign third of 9 at Sale 3yo Mdn-Sw September 14 over 1411m, 2.75 len behind Victorious Spirit with 56kg at $31. Minor hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1600m, soft track; 5 len behind Knee Deep with 52kg at $6. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly and ungenerously in the lead in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (North Pacific - Sizzling Belle). Ben, Will & Jd Hayes has her ready for this with three recent trials prior to her debut today. Finished fourth in a Pakenham jump-out on March 24. Breaks from a low barrier draw so keep a close eye on any market push.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fourth of 10 at Werribee F&M Mdn-Sw December 7 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind Marine Empress carrying 56.5kg at $11. On debut sixth of 8 at Mornington 3yo F Mdn-Sw November 2 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Caffettiera carrying 57kg at $10. Can run a solid race fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start, bumped. Then shortly after carried out by Onya Shoulders.
Laid in rounding the home turn and in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Filly by Bivouac on debut. Finished fourth in a Cranbourne jump-out on April 6. Betting best guide.
